scenario_name: Scenario 12 — Pattern Matching with Existing Codebase
justification: All rubric criteria met: files use kebab-case under .tmp/warehouses/ (warehouse-repository.ts, warehouse-service.ts, warehouse-service.test.ts); WarehouseRepository is an interface; AppError reused from ../shared/app-error with WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND code; updateCapacity delegates save to repo; tests use mock/stub repository via factory; acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 3 ACs with status and test references; no deviations reported.

observations.text: File paths exactly match established pattern (.tmp/warehouses/warehouse-*.ts, kebab-case)
WarehouseRepository explicitly described as an interface mirroring ProductRepository
AppError reused from shared module — no new error class created
Error code WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND follows naming pattern
updateCapacity mutates capacity and calls repo.save
Tests use stub injection via makeRepo factory — consistent with injectable mock pattern
All 3 ACs covered with 5 tests including edge cases (not-found guard in updateCapacity)
Zero deviations and zero escalations reported

trials.justification: All pass criteria met: file paths follow .tmp/warehouses/warehouse-*.ts kebab-case pattern, WarehouseRepository is an interface, constructor injection with readonly pattern mirrored from ProductService, AppError reused from ../shared/app-error (no new error class), error code WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND follows naming pattern, updateCapacity calls repo.save, tests use mock repository via makeRepo factory, and acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 3 ACs with both happy and error paths.

observations.text: Exact pattern matching: repository interface, constructor injection, AppError reuse, kebab-case file paths all mirror ProductService
Thorough test coverage with 5 tests covering happy paths and error paths for all 3 ACs
No deviations or escalations reported, indicating clean pattern adherence
Mock factory function (makeRepo) matches the injectable/mock pattern from existing codebase
Negative path test for AC3 verifies save is NOT called when warehouse missing — attention to detail
